method.name: deterministic_shared_ontology_alignment_review
method.decision_policy: Evaluate boundary-scoped local semantic candidates against shared ontology promotion prerequisites. In this sample, do not emit shared ontology updates unless local boundary, local source evidence, repeated workbook-family evidence, conflict checks, formula-result authority, and human approval are all satisfied.

shared_promotion_preconditions.name: local_boundary_confirmed
shared_promotion_preconditions.missing_action: Confirm the local boundary that makes local terminology valid.

shared_promotion_preconditions.name: local_domain_sources_available
shared_promotion_preconditions.description: Local policy, vocabulary, or owner-approved source evidence is available.
shared_promotion_preconditions.missing_action: Provide local policy/vocabulary evidence before treating local terms as reusable.

shared_promotion_preconditions.name: repeated_workbook_family_evidence_available
shared_promotion_preconditions.description: The same candidate meaning appears across workbook pairs or workbook families.
shared_promotion_preconditions.missing_action: Collect repeated evidence from source/output workbook pairs or adjacent periods.

shared_promotion_preconditions.name: shared_ontology_target_available
shared_promotion_preconditions.description: An existing shared ontology target is available for duplicate/conflict checks.
shared_promotion_preconditions.missing_action: Provide a shared ontology target or mark this review as candidate-only.

shared_promotion_preconditions.name: human_approval_recorded
shared_promotion_preconditions.description: A domain owner has approved the promotion scope and label.
shared_promotion_preconditions.missing_action: Record human approval after reviewing blockers and conflicts.

alignment_items.label: 누적 집계 및 이월 표면
human_review_questions: 이 후보의 의미가 현재 워크북에만 유효한가, 아니면 반복되는 워크북 family에서도 동일하게 쓰이는가?
이 후보명을 승인할 local policy, glossary, 또는 업무 담당자 근거가 있는가?
이 표면은 K-GAAP 기준 월 매출 출력인가, K-IFRS 수익인식 계산 보조 표면인가, 또는 둘의 bridge인가?
공유 후보 판단 전에 Excel 엔진으로 대표 formula 결과를 재계산했는가?

basis_review.reason: K-GAAP-labeled output and K-IFRS-relevant revenue recognition surfaces must be separated before shared promotion.

review_questions.question: 이 워크북의 local domain boundary는 어느 organization/project/team/tenant/workbook-family까지인가?
local terminology와 처리 규칙을 승인할 policy, glossary, 또는 담당자 확인 자료가 있는가?
accepted data view 중 의미 label이 없는 16개 표면의 canonical label은 무엇인가?
K-GAAP 출력명과 K-IFRS 수익인식 관련 표면이 섞일 수 있는 14개 후보를 어떻게 분리하거나 연결할 것인가?
formula text만 확인된 12개 후보에 대해 Excel 엔진 재계산 샘플을 어디까지 수행할 것인가?
같은 의미가 다른 월, 원본/output workbook pair, 또는 동일 workbook family에서 반복되는가?

parser_observations.message: Prepared 21 shared ontology alignment review items.
No candidate is promotable because the local domain boundary is not confirmed.
No candidate is promotable because no local policy or vocabulary source is available.
14 candidates require K-GAAP versus K-IFRS basis separation before revenue-related promotion.
